sentences.english: I try to go to bed around 11 PM, but honestly, I'm a bit of a night person. I love staying up late and working on projects. But my job requires me to wake up at 6:30 AM.
sentences.korean: 밤 11시쯤 자려고 하는데, 솔직히 저는 약간 밤형 인간이에요. 늦게까지 깨어 있으면서 프로젝트 작업하는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: So I usually get about 6 to 6.5 hours of sleep. Ideally, I would like more sleep, but that's what I manage.
sentences.korean: 보통 6시간에서 6시간 반 정도 자요. 이상적으로는 더 자고 싶지만, 그 정도가 제가 할 수 있는 거예요.

sentences.english: I usually wake up around 6:30 AM on workdays. On weekends, I like to sleep in and wake up around 9 or 10 AM. My sleep schedule is pretty regular, which I think is important for your health. I try to be in bed by 11 PM on weeknights.
sentences.korean: 평일에는 보통 6시 30분에 일어나요. 주말에는 늦잠 자면서 9시나 10시에 일어나요. 수면 일정은 꽤 규칙적이에요.

sentences.english: I'm definitely a night owl. I usually go to bed around 2 or 3 AM, and I wake up around 10 AM. I know that's not the most productive schedule, but that's when I'm most alert and energized. I do my best work late at night.
sentences.korean: 확실히 올빼미형이에요. 보통 새벽 2~3시에 자고 오전 10시에 일어나요. 가장 건강한 일정은 아닌 걸 알지만요.

sentences.english: I've been trying to establish a better sleep routine. I want to be in bed by 11 PM and wake up at 6:30 AM. That would give me about 7.5 hours, which is what I need to feel rested. Some nights I manage it, but other nights I stay up too late.
sentences.korean: 더 나은 수면 루틴을 만들려고 노력 중이에요. 밤 11시에 자고 아침 6시 30분에 일어나고 싶어요. 그러면 약 7시간 반이 되거든요.

quiz.question: What does '수면 루틴' mean in English?
